label: transport network
description: network the infrastructure is a part of

label: instance of
description: type to which this subject corresponds/belongs. Different from P279 (subclass of); for example: K2 is an instance of mountain; volcano is a subclass of mountain

label: owned by
description: owner of the subject

label: located in the administrative territorial entity
description: the item is located on the territory of the following administrative entity. Use P276 for specifying locations that are non-administrative places and for items about events. Use P1382 if the item falls only partially into the administrative entity

label: flag
description: subject's flag

label: structure replaced by
description: the item which replaced this building or structure, at the same geographic location

label: subclass of
description: this item is a subclass (subset) of that item; ALL instances of this item are instances of that item; different from P31 (instance of), e.g.: volcano is a subclass of mountain; Everest is an instance of mountain

label: child organization/unit
description: child organization/unit of a organization/unit; for companies, generally a fully owned separate corp., see business division (P199); opposite of parent org./unit (P749); use instance of (P31) to distinguish org. (Q43229) and org. unit (Q10387680)

label: part of
description: object of which the subject is a part (if this subject is already part of object A which is a part of object B, then please only make the subject part of object A), inverse property of "has part" (P527, see also "has parts of the class" (P2670))

label: has use
description: main use of the subject (includes current and former usage)

label: companion of
description: two or more astronomic bodies of the same type relating to each other

label: soundtrack release
description: music release that incorporates music directly recorded from the soundtrack of an audiovisual work

label: stock exchange
description: exchange on which this company is traded

label: foundational text
description: text through which an institution or object has been created or established

label: opposite of
description: item that is in some way the opposite of this item

label: occupant
description: person or organization occupying property

label: interleaves with
description: stratigraphic relation in which two units overlap each other marginally

label: has part(s)
description: part of this subject; inverse property of "part of" (P361). See also "has parts of the class" (P2670).

label: underlies
description: stratigraphic unit that this unit lies under (i.e. the overlying unit)

label: overlies
description: stratigraphic unit that this unit lies over (i.e. the underlying unit)

label: mother house
description: principal house or community for a religious institute

label: replaced synonym (for nom. nov.)
description: previously published name on which a replacement name (avowed substitute, nomen novum) is based

label: appointed by
description: who appointed the person to the position, can be used as a qualifier

label: significant event
description: significant or notable events associated with the subject

label: IUCN protected areas category
description: protected areas category by the World Commission on Protected Areas. Used with dedicated items for each category.

label: decays to
description: what isotope does this radioactive isotope decay to

label: mascot
description: mascot of an organization, e.g. a sports team or university

label: has cause
description: underlying cause, entity that ultimately resulted in this effect

label: day in year for periodic occurrence
description: when a specific holiday or periodic event occurs. It can be used as statement or qualifier

label: CPU
description: central processing unit found within the subject item

label: anatomical location
description: where in the body or cell does this feature or condition lie or happen

label: place served by transport hub
description: territorial entity or entities served by this transport hub (airport, train station, etc.)

label: applies to jurisdiction
description: the item (institution, law, public office, public register, etc) or statement belongs to or has power over or applies to the value (a territorial jurisdiction: a country, state, municipality, etc)

label: engine configuration
description: configuration of an engine's cylinders

label: political ideology
description: political ideology of an organization or person or of a work (such as a newspaper)

label: topic's main Wikimedia portal
description: Wikimedia portal associated with this topic

label: location of landing
description: location where the craft landed

label: Wikimedia portal's main topic
description: primary topic of this Wikimedia portal

label: represents
description: organization, individual, or concept that an entity represents

label: godparent
description: person who is the godparent of a given person

label: has facet polytope
description: facet of a polytope, in the next-lower dimension

label: dual to
description: dual of a polytope, graph or curve

label: structure replaces
description: the item this building or structure replaced, at the same geographic location

label: original combination
description: for animals: the combination (binomen or trinomen) where the species-group name used in this taxon name was first published

label: GUI toolkit or framework
description: framework or toolkit a program uses to display the graphical user interface

label: taxon synonym
description: name listed as synonym of this item's taxon name

label: takes place in fictional universe
description: the subject is a work describing a fictional universe, i.e. whose plot occurs in this universe

label: fictional universe described in
description: to link a fictional universe with a work that describes it: <universe> "described in the work:" <work>

label: hybrid of
description: parent of this hybrid breed or cultivar

label: contributing factor of
description: thing that is significantly influenced by this cause, but does not directly result from it. See 'Help:Modeling causes' for examples and discussion.

label: has effect
description: effect of this item

label: given name version for other gender
description: equivalent name (with respect to the meaning of the name) in the same language: female version of a male first name, male version of a female first name. Add primarily the closest matching one

label: lowest point
description: point with lowest elevation in a region or path

label: has melody
description: this work has the melody of the following work

label: pendant of
description: other work in a pair of opposing artworks, such as wedding portraits, commissioned together, but not always

label: wing configuration
description: configuration of wing(s) used by an aircraft

label: has vertex figure
description: the figure exposed when a corner of a polytope is sliced off

label: list related to category
description: Wikimedia list equivalent to a Wikimedia category

label: category related to list
description: Wikimedia category that matches the Wikimedia list

label: different from
description: item that is different from another item, with which it may be confused

label: substitute/deputy/replacement of office/officeholder
description: function that serves as deputy/replacement of this function/office (scope/conditions vary depending on office)

label: antiparticle
description: particle with the same rest mass and opposite charges

label: solid solution series with
description: the mineral forms a continous (true) or discontinous "solid solution series" with another mineral

label: uses
description: item or concept used by the subject or in the operation (see also instrument [P1303] and armament [P520])

label: venous drainage
description: vein draining the anatomical structure

label: statistical unit used
description: base item of this database or statistical set

label: position held by head of the organization
description: position of the head of this item

label: organization directed by the office or position
description: organization or project which is directed by this office

label: league level above
description: the league above this sports league

label: league level below
description: the league below this sports league

label: amended by
description: document is amended by specified other document

label: repealed by
description: document is repealed/inactived by specified other document

label: has part(s) of the class
description: the subject has one or more parts of the object class

label: next crossing upstream
description: next crossing of this river, canal, etc. upstream of this subject

label: next crossing downstream
description: next crossing of this river, canal, etc. downstream of this subject

label: is recto of
description: the two-dimensional artwork that is on the back (verso) side of this artwork

label: is verso of
description: the two-dimensional artwork that is on the front (recto) side of this artwork

label: this zoological name is coordinate with
description: links coordinate zoological names

label: connector
description: physical connectors which the device has/supports

label: permanent duplicated item
description: this item duplicates another item and the two can't be merged, as one Wikimedia project includes two pages, e.g. in different scripts or languages (only applies to some wikis, e.g.: cdowiki, gomwiki, nanwiki). Use P31=Q17362920 for other wikis.

label: adjacent building
description: building adjacent to the item

label: official religion
description: official religion in this administrative entity

label: qualifies for event
description: this event qualifies for that event

label: develops from
description: this class of items develops from another class of items (biology)

label: parent peak
description: higher peak whose territory this peak resides in, where the territory is defined by a contour line through a key col, which can be selected based on several competing approaches

label: repeals
description: this document or act repeals that other document or act

label: anatomical branch of
description: main stem of this blood vessel, lymphatic vessel or nerve

label: has anatomical branch
description: branches of this blood vessel, lymphatic vessel or nerve

label: coextensive with
description: this item has the same boundary as the target item; area associated with (this) entity is identical with the area associated with that entity

label: designated as terrorist by
description: country or organization that has officially designated a given group as a terrorist organization (e.g. for India, listed on http://mha.nic.in/BO )

label: next lower rank
description: lower rank or level in a ranked hierarchy like sport league, military ranks. If there are several possible, list each one and qualify with "criterion used" (P1013), avoid using ranks and date qualifiers. For sports leagues/taxa, use specific properties instead.

label: next higher rank
description: higher rank or level in a ranked hierarchy like sport league, military ranks. If there are several possible, list each one and qualify with "criterion used" (P1013), avoid using ranks and date qualifiers. For sports leagues/taxa, use specific properties instead.

label: diaspora
description: diaspora that a cultural group belongs to

label: conjugate acid
description: species formed by accepting a proton (H⁺)

label: conjugate base
description: species formed by losing a proton (H⁺)

label: game mechanics
description: constructs of rules or methods designed for interaction with the game state

label: category populated by
description: software component (template, module, extension, MediaWiki core) populating the category

label: nominated by
description: who nominated a person for an office or award; can be used as a qualifier

label: sexually homologous with
description: body part that originates from the same tissue or cell during fetal development in the opposing sex

label: reservoir created
description: reservoir created upstream of a dam by this dam

label: geomorphological unit
description: topographic or bathymetric feature to which this geographical item belongs

label: created by dam
description: construction impounding this watercourse or creating this reservoir

label: prerequisite
description: prior event or achievement that a person or team needs to complete before joining or obtaining the item topic, e.g. a qualifying round of a sports event, a lower-level course in an educational program, or a lower level of a professional qualification

label: greater than
description: instances of the item have a greater value than corresponding instances of the object, for the given measure

label: grade of kanji
description: degree of difficulty of kanji

label: surname for other gender
description: gender inflection of surname, patronymic or matronymic

label: located in the religious territorial entity
description: the item is located on the territory of the following religious entity. Use P708 (diocese) for dioceses

label: risk factor
description: factor associated with a high prevalence of a particular gene, disease or characteristic. These factors can be country of origin, country of citizenship, race, gender, occupation, anamnesis, etc.

label: distributary
description: stream that branches off and flows away from the river

label: tautomer of
description: target item is a tautomer of this one

label: advertises
description: cause, organization or product targeted by the advertising campaign, character, jingle or slogan

label: has lyrics
description: work whose text is used as the lyrics of this work

label: ordeal by
description: manner of judicial practice by which the guilt or innocence of the accused was determined

label: supervised by
description: natural person who has the authority of giving instructions and/or orders to subordinates and is held responsible for the work and actions of subordinates

label: associated electoral district
description: constituencies/electoral districts in which a place is located or is part of. If a municipality/county is split into or part of several districts: add several values. Use only if distinct from administrative entities (P131) in predefined countries

label: symbol of
description: item of which the image is a symbol

label: located in the statistical territorial entity
description: statistical territorial entity in which a place is located or is part of. If a municipality or county is split into or part of several regions: add several values

label: is metaclass for
description: all instances of the subject are subclasses of the object

label: curriculum topics
description: topic or subject included in the curriculum

label: parish church(es)
description: church(es) which acts as the religious center of a parish

label: has column
description: columns for entries in the appendix, list or table

label: external auditor
description: external company or person appointed to audit a business' or an organization's books, requirement for many companies

label: mathematical inverse
description: inverse element with respect to binary operation given as a qualifier using P2210

label: subdivision of this unit
description: name of subdivision of this unit/currency

label: supplement to
description: subject work or edition updates or otherwise complements the object work or edition

label: populates category
description: Wikimedia category which is populated by this template, module or extension

label: associated cadastral district
description: cadastral district in which a place is located or is part of. Use only if distinct from administrative entities (P131) in predefined countries

label: computational complexity
description: the most specific complexity class this computational problem has been proved to belong to; if available, provide the tight complexity, otherwise both hardness and membership can be specified

label: trained by
description: person who trained the subject, a human or an animal

label: athletics program
description: the name of a school's athletics program, as opposed to individual teams in particular sports

label: official observer status in organization
description: organization by which the subject is granted observer status

label: clerked for
description: this person has held a clerkship with the judge

label: appeals to
description: court or other body that hears appeals from subject's decisions

label: replaced synonym of
description: taxon item which replaced this taxon name (now only a synonym) - inverse property of replaced synonym (for nom. nov.) (P694)

label: protonym of
description: taxon item of which this taxon name is a protonym (original name, for zoological taxa) - inverse property of original combination

label: class of agent(s) of action
description: class of animate items that may initiate this action or class of actions (for roles of agents, use P12993)

label: homonymous taxon
description: taxon item of which the taxon name is an exact homonym

label: organisation tax status
description: jurisdiction specific tax status of organisations like non-profits

label: nomenclatural type of
description: taxon item of which this item is the taxonomic type (name-bearing type), e.g. the family for which this genus is the type, the genus for which this species is the type, the taxon for which this type specimen is the type, ect...
